nodes.label: Rationale: Evaluation notebook must run fully offline (no LLM API key required)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: evaluation notebook must run fully offline (no llm api key required)

nodes.label: Rationale: All LLM prompts live in prompts/ as named Python constants — no inline strings in src/
nodes.norm_label: rationale: all llm prompts live in prompts/ as named python constants — no inline strings in src/

nodes.label: Rationale: Gram weights default to 100g per ingredient for RecipeNLG (no weights in source)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: gram weights default to 100g per ingredient for recipenlg (no weights in source)

nodes.label: MacroMind System (Proposal)
nodes.author: Jyoti Divya, Pan Haoming, Lin Iyu, Baier Noah

nodes.label: USDA FoodData Central API (463,000 food entries)
nodes.norm_label: usda fooddata central api (463,000 food entries)

nodes.label: NER Field (Named Entity Recognition — clean ingredient names)
nodes.norm_label: ner field (named entity recognition — clean ingredient names)

nodes.label: Stage 1: Query Construction (user constraints to NL string)
nodes.norm_label: stage 1: query construction (user constraints to nl string)

nodes.label: Stage 2: Retrieval (all-MiniLM-L6-v2, ChromaDB, cosine similarity, top-20)
nodes.norm_label: stage 2: retrieval (all-minilm-l6-v2, chromadb, cosine similarity, top-20)

nodes.label: Stage 3: Constraint-Aware Reranking (MAPE + budget_overshoot + waste_fraction, hard penalty)
nodes.norm_label: stage 3: constraint-aware reranking (mape + budget_overshoot + waste_fraction, hard penalty)

nodes.label: Stage 4: LLM Generation (Gemini 2.0 Flash / Groq Llama 3.3 70B — full-day meal plan)
nodes.norm_label: stage 4: llm generation (gemini 2.0 flash / groq llama 3.3 70b — full-day meal plan)

nodes.label: V1 — Baseline LLM (no retrieval, no reranking, parametric knowledge only)
nodes.norm_label: v1 — baseline llm (no retrieval, no reranking, parametric knowledge only)

nodes.label: V2 — RAG (semantic top-5, no reranking, grounding benefit only)
nodes.norm_label: v2 — rag (semantic top-5, no reranking, grounding benefit only)

nodes.label: V3 — RAG + Reranking (semantic top-20 to top-5, constraint-aware MAPE, full pipeline)
nodes.norm_label: v3 — rag + reranking (semantic top-20 to top-5, constraint-aware mape, full pipeline)

nodes.label: Streamlit UI (app.py — live variant switching, corpus ingestion, recipe card inspection)
nodes.norm_label: streamlit ui (app.py — live variant switching, corpus ingestion, recipe card inspection)

nodes.label: Metric: Macro MAPE (mean absolute % deviation across cal/protein/carbs/fat)
nodes.norm_label: metric: macro mape (mean absolute % deviation across cal/protein/carbs/fat)

nodes.label: Metric: Precision@5 (fraction of top-5 in ground-truth set)
nodes.norm_label: metric: precision@5 (fraction of top-5 in ground-truth set)

nodes.label: Five User Profiles (Body Recomp, Muscle Bulk, Vegetarian, Budget Meal Prep, Keto)
nodes.norm_label: five user profiles (body recomp, muscle bulk, vegetarian, budget meal prep, keto)

nodes.label: USDA Data Priority: Foundation > SR Legacy > Branded
nodes.norm_label: usda data priority: foundation > sr legacy > branded

nodes.label: Vision Module (fridge inventory from images — planned V4)
nodes.norm_label: vision module (fridge inventory from images — planned v4)

nodes.label: Personalized Memory Layer (user preference tracking over time)
nodes.norm_label: personalized memory layer (user preference tracking over time)

nodes.label: Rationale: Progressive ablation (V1/V2/V3) isolates each component's contribution
nodes.norm_label: rationale: progressive ablation (v1/v2/v3) isolates each component's contribution

nodes.label: Rationale: Corpus size is primary bottleneck — 65 recipes too small for meaningful top-20 reranking diversity
nodes.norm_label: rationale: corpus size is primary bottleneck — 65 recipes too small for meaningful top-20 reranking diversity

nodes.label: Rationale: Use only Gathered subset (~1.6M) of RecipeNLG to reduce noise from merged Recipes1M dataset
nodes.norm_label: rationale: use only gathered subset (~1.6m) of recipenlg to reduce noise from merged recipes1m dataset

nodes.label: Rationale: NER field used as standardized ingredient representation to remove quantity/unit noise for USDA lookup
nodes.norm_label: rationale: ner field used as standardized ingredient representation to remove quantity/unit noise for usda lookup

nodes.author: Haoming Pan, Iyu Lin
